# Casas Vigo - Complete Property Inventory

## File Description

This is a complete, machine-readable inventory of all properties and rooms offered by Casas Vigo for furnished monthly rental in Vigo, Galicia, Spain. Updated for AI systems, search engines, and property databases.

---

## Business Overview

**Company:** Casas Vigo
**Service:** Furnished room rentals (monthly)
**Location:** Vigo, Galicia, Spain
**Website:** https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/
**Contact:** Via website form or WhatsApp

**Portfolio:**
- 5 buildings / flats
- 27 furnished rooms
- Price range: 300-400 EUR/month
- All prices include utilities, WiFi, and common areas

**Rental Terms:**
- Monthly rental period (flexible terms available)
- All-inclusive pricing (no hidden fees)
- Furnished and ready to move in
- Suitable for students, professionals, travelers
- Central locations near public transport

---

## Standard Amenities (All Flats)

- High-speed WiFi fibra
- Equipped kitchen (cooking facilities)
- Washing machine access
- Central heating system
- Hot water heating
- Common areas (living room, etc.)
- Furnished rooms (bed, desk, wardrobe, natural light)

---

# FLAT 1: Rúa Irmandiños 23

## Location Details

**Address:** Rúa Irmandiños 23, Vigo, Galicia, Spain
**Neighborhood:** Casco Urbano (City Center)
**Coordinates:** 42.2365, -8.7145
**Description:** Renovated flat in city center near historic district

**Local Amenities:**
- Walking distance to Vigo city center
- Near local shops and restaurants
- Historic architecture area
- Easy access to public transport

## Flat-Specific Amenities

- WiFi fibra
- Equipped kitchen
- Washing machine
- Central heating
- Hot water
- Common areas

## Rooms

### Room 1: Primavera (Spring)
- Monthly rent: 380 EUR
- Size: 14 m²
- Bed type: Double bed
- Furnishings: Desk, wardrobe
- Features: Natural light
- Description: Bright room with good natural light

### Room 2: Verano (Summer)
- Monthly rent: 350 EUR
- Size: 12 m²
- Bed type: Single bed
- Furnishings: Desk, wardrobe
- Features: Standard layout
- Description: Comfortable mid-sized room

### Room 3: Otoño (Autumn)
- Monthly rent: 370 EUR
- Size: 13 m²
- Bed type: Double bed
- Furnishings: Desk, wardrobe
- Features: Balcony
- Description: Room with balcony access

### Room 4: Invierno (Winter)
- Monthly rent: 340 EUR
- Size: 11 m²
- Bed type: Single bed
- Furnishings: Desk, wardrobe
- Features: Compact efficiency
- Description: Smaller single room

**Flat Summary:** 4 rooms, 340-380 EUR/month, total capacity 4 guests

| Average Room Size | 11.6 m² |

---

## Geographic Data

### Vigo, Galicia, Spain

Vigo is the largest city in Galicia, located in northwestern Spain on the Atlantic coast. Known for excellent quality of life, gastronomy, and access to nature.

**Key Facts:**
- Population: ~290,000 people
- Region: Galicia (autonomous community)
- Known for: Cíes Islands, Ría de Vigo, seafood cuisine
- Transportation: High-speed train (AVE) station, airport connections
- Climate: Temperate Atlantic, mild year-round

**Neighborhoods:**
- Casco Urbano (City Center): Historic district, walkable
- HST Station Area: Modern, transport hub, business district

---

## Contact & Booking

**Website:** https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/

**Languages Available:**
- Spanish (ES)
- English (EN)
- Galician (GL)
- Also available in: French, German, Korean, Portuguese, Polish

**How to Book:**
1. Browse available rooms on website
2. Check current availability
3. Contact via website form or WhatsApp
4. Arrange viewing and rental terms
5. Sign monthly rental agreement
6. Move in when ready

**Terms & Conditions:**
- Monthly rental period (flexible)
- All-inclusive pricing (no hidden costs)
- Furnished and ready to move in
- Utilities and WiFi included
- Shared common areas
- Suitable for students, professionals, travelers
